Who we are

Built to make private aviation accessible.

Upper Jets was created to make private aviation more accessible — without compromising on luxury, safety, or service. A focused commitment grown into a full-service Part 135 operation serving the Americas.

Our leadership brings over 30 years of combined experience — exceeded every single flight.

30+
Years exp.
ARGUS
Gold rated
Part 135
Certified
4
Regions
Our values
01
Safety
ARGUS Gold certified — independently verified, annually renewed.
02
Excellence
We hold ourselves to the standard clients expect, then exceed it.
03
Accuracy
In aviation, precision is a requirement. Zero margin for error.
04
Integrity
Clear, honest communication from quote to landing — no surprises.

Primary service

On-demand charter, done right.

We operate worldwide on-demand air charter with the responsiveness and reliability that brokers and clients depend on. Every flight planned to the highest standard, 24/7.

01
Safety first
ARGUS Gold certified — the highest safety rating in the industry.
02
24/7 Availability
Our dispatch team on call around the clock. No mission too last-minute.
03
Broker-friendly
Fast quotes, clear comms, no surprises — built for how brokers work.
04
Americas coverage
US, Mexico, Caribbean, South America — one certificate, one standard.
Certification

Where we fly

The Americas are your runway.

From the Florida coast to the peaks of South America — four regions, one certified operator.

United StatesAll 48 contiguous states
MexicoMexico City · Cancún · Los Cabos
CaribbeanNassau · Turks & Caicos · St. Maarten
